raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wlofchanas to Lauschu/ 
un winno Seewu prett 
weem Brahteem teem Judeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tur bija/ kaß fazzija: 
nehs ar faweem Dehleem/ un 
tawahm Meitahn eßim 
uds/ tapehz jemßim Labbibu/ 
mehs ehdam un dsihtwojam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur bija arridsan/ kaß faz-
ja: Mehs par Kihlu tsdohßim 
nhßus Tihrumus/ un muhßus 
Bihna-Dahrsus/ un muhßus 
ammus/ ka mehs schinni Bad-
warram Labbibu dabbuht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl btja/ kaß fazzija: 
id mehs Naudu atschemmam 
muhfeem Tihrumeeu/ un 
uhfeem Wihna-Dahrseem/ ka 
hs tam kehnixam Metlus 
hdam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu irr jo muhßu Meefa/ 
muhfu Brahtu Meefa/ muh-
Behrni/ ka muhßu Brahtu 
Behrni/ un rangi/ mehs pamet-
n muhßus Dehlus/ un muh-
s Mettas par Kalpeem. Ir no 
uhßam Meitahn zittas jaw 
dohtas/ un arri Padohma 
hfu Rochkâ newa/ ir muhfu 
brumi/ un muhßu Wihna-
hrßi zitteem taps.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad apskaitohß es fohti/
es wiꞥu Brehtschannu/ un 
hs Wahrdus dsirdeju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un manna Sirßs apdoh-
jahß eekich mannuu/ pehz to 
rohs es ar teem Augstnee-
n/ un ar teem Waldnekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fazziju uhs teem: Grib-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "bat juhs pachyi weens uhs ohtru 
gnuhtu Nastu likt? Un es weddu 
prett teem weenu leelu Draudßi/ 
un fazziju us teem: Mehs effim 
fawus Brahtus tohs Judus/ 
kas teem Paganeem pahrdohti 
bija/ mohku atpirkufchi/ arrig 
tad juhs fawus Brahtus pahr-
dohtfeet/ jeb buhs mums pahr-
dohteem tapt? Tad zeete tee klufs-
fu/ un ne warreja neweenu 
Wahrdn atbildcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazziju es: Ta Leeta 
ne irr labba/ ko juhs darat/neg-
gi jums eekich Bibjafchanas 
muhfu Deewa btja staigaht/ to 
Pagaxu/ muhtn Eenuidneeku 
Neewatchanas labbad.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig es/ manni Brahti/ 
un manni Jauneßi praffam no 
teem Naudu jeb Labbibu/ laid 
jelle mehs scho Gruhtibn atlai-
schain.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Atdohdeet jelle teem fcho-
deem wiꞥan Tihrumus/ wiꞥan 
Wihna-Dahrsus/ wiꞥan Etjes-
Dahrsus/ un wiꞥan Nammus/ 
un to fimtu Teefu Nandas/ un 
Labbibas/ un Wihna/ un Etjes/ 
ko juhs no tecin eßat Augtôß 
jehtmucht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee: Mehs 
atdohßim/ un ne mekleßim no tecin 
neueka/ mehs darrißim/ ka tu 
fakft. Un es aizinaju tohs Prec-
sterus/ un ukku tohs svebreht/ 
ka teem bija pehz scho Leetu dar-
riht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
